title: Three-hand clock shows device loading overlay every segment
description: Current stitched segment uploads trigger loading animation every segment boundary. Need default no-loading delivery path for continuous clock display.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementing no-loading clock delivery mode: add push-based continuous renderer and make it default for demo_three_hand_clock.py.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented fix in demo_three_hand_clock.py: added --delivery push|stitched and switched default to push. Push delivery continuously sends frames and avoids per-segment loading overlays. Stitched mode retained for diagnostics.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Resolved in current clock path: push delivery removes periodic loading overlay during clock playback.
